metadata.name: Aeralith, the Cliffborne Isle
metadata.description: A single rectangular landmass adrift in an infinite void, its edges sheared into vertical cliffs over which every river empties as a waterfall into the emptiness below. Elevation and climate grade diagonally: glacier-crowned snow peaks in the northwest give way through temperate highlands and dense broadleaf forest to central grasslands, a bird-and-bat-pollinated flowering grove in the northeast, a xeric desert, and a still-active volcanic wasteland in the south. A ring of beaches and a shallow coastal ocean skirt the whole island. Glacial meltwater is the engine of the world, threading every biome before it leaps off the rim. No people have ever walked here.

regions.name: Frostspire Highlands
regions.description: Glaciated peaks and snow forest at the island's high northwest corner.

regions.name: Windward Highlands
regions.description: Rolling temperate plateau below the snowline, laced with springs.

regions.name: Blossom Grove
regions.description: Sheltered flowering woodland fed by highland runoff.

regions.name: Deepwood
regions.description: Dense broadleaf forest filling the wet western flank.

regions.name: Sunla Prairie
regions.description: Open central grassland, the crossroads of the island's rivers.

regions.name: Emberreach
regions.description: Basalt wasteland around an active volcano at the south margin.

regions.name: Dunemarch
regions.description: Rain-shadowed sand and mesa country in the dry southeast.

regions.name: Rimshore
regions.description: The beach-and-cliff band ringing the island where land meets the void.

regions.name: Encircling Shallows
regions.description: The shallow coastal ocean that laps the whole rim before the drop.

features.name: Frostspire Range
features.description: The island's snow-clad spine, its faces calving ice.

features.name: Frost Crown
features.description: Highest summit of Aeralith, permanently glaciated.

features.name: Hollowmere Glacier
features.description: A slow river of ice whose snout births the island's meltwater.

features.name: Windward Plateau
features.description: Broad grassy tableland catching the westerlies.

features.name: Deepwood Vale
features.description: A humid forested trough sheltered from wind.

features.name: Sunla Plain
features.description: Flat river-braided grassland at the island's heart.

features.name: Blossom Hills
features.description: Low sheltering hills cradling the flowering grove.

features.name: Dunemarch Ergs
features.description: Wind-piled sand ridges in the rain shadow.

features.name: Ochre Mesa
features.description: A flat-topped rock island rising from the dunes.

features.name: Mount Cindermaw
features.description: An active shield volcano venting ash at the south rim.

features.name: Blacksill Basin
features.description: A cooled lava depression pooling mineral-rich runoff.

features.name: The Rimcliffs
features.description: Sheer vertical walls where the island shears off into the void; rivers leap from their lips.

bodies.name: Hollowmere Melt
bodies.description: Braided meltwater streams pouring from the glacier snout.

bodies.name: Glassrun River
bodies.description: The island's main river, crossing snow, highland and prairie.

bodies.name: Clearbrow Spring
bodies.description: A cold plateau spring welling from fractured basalt.

bodies.name: Mirrormere
bodies.description: A still highland tarn brimmed by the spring.

bodies.name: Fernwater Brook
bodies.description: A shaded brook threading the Deepwood before the western rim.

bodies.name: Petalflow
bodies.description: A gentle distributary watering the flowering grove.

bodies.name: Glassrun Leap
bodies.description: Where Glassrun River hurls off the southeastern cliff into the void.

bodies.name: Fernwater Leap
bodies.description: A slender fall spilling from the western Rimcliffs.

bodies.name: Petalflow Leap
bodies.description: The grove's stream feathering off the eastern rim.

bodies.name: Mirage Pool
bodies.description: A fault-fed pool at the mesa's foot, the desert's only open water.

bodies.name: Cindersteam Spring
bodies.description: A steaming mineral spring warmed by the volcano's flank.

bodies.name: Encircling Shallows
bodies.description: The salt coastal ocean ringing the isle, held on the rim shelf before the drop.

zones.name: Frost Crown Alpine
zones.description: Ice, bare rock and cushion plants above the treeline.

zones.name: Frostspire Snow Forest
zones.description: Dense conifer belt on the mountains' lower slopes.

zones.name: Windward Highland
zones.description: Cool grassy plateau of heath and scattered stands.

zones.name: Deepwood Temperate Forest
zones.description: Humid broadleaf forest, the island's richest land canopy.

zones.name: Sunla Grassland
zones.description: Wind-rippled central prairie braided by the main river.

zones.name: Blossom Flowering Grove
zones.description: Sheltered woodland ablaze with bird- and bat-pollinated bloom.

zones.name: Dunemarch Desert
zones.description: Hot rain-shadow sand and mesa, life clustered at the oasis.

zones.name: Emberreach Volcanic
zones.description: Ash plains and cooled basalt around an active vent.

zones.name: Rimshore Beach
zones.description: Sand and cliff-lip shore where the falls plunge into void.

zones.name: Encircling Coastal Ocean
zones.description: Shallow salt water skirting the rim, kelp-forested and reef-fringed.

species.name: Frostpine
species.description: Wind-hardy conifer anchoring the snow forest.

species.name: Rime Moss
species.description: Cushion moss carpeting rock beneath the pines.

species.name: Silverneedle Fir
species.description: Tall fir giving cover to alpine birds.

species.name: Windward Heather
species.description: Nectar-rich heath blanketing the plateau.

species.name: Deepwood Oak
species.description: Mast-bearing canopy tree of the western forest.

species.name: Vale Fern
species.description: Shade fern blanketing the forest floor.

species.name: Sunla Grass
species.description: Dominant bunchgrass of the central prairie.

species.name: Prairie Goldenrod
species.description: Late-season nectar flower thick with bees.

species.name: Sunbell Blossom
species.description: Tubular red flower shaped for a sunbird's bill.

species.name: Mooncup Vine
species.description: Night-opening vine pollinated by nectar bats.

species.name: Dunemarch Barrel
species.description: Water-hoarding cactus flowering for desert moths.

species.name: Ochre Sage
species.description: Aromatic scrub anchoring the dune margins.

species.name: Cinder Lichen
species.description: Pioneer crust colonizing cooled basalt.

species.name: Emberfrond
species.description: Heat-tolerant fern of ash-shadowed cracks.

species.name: Rimshore Grass
species.description: Dune-binding grass along the cliff-top shore.

species.name: Rim Kelp
species.description: Submarine forest sheltering reef fish.

species.name: Shallows Seagrass
species.description: Meadow-forming seagrass grazed by turtles.

species.name: Rime Hare
species.description: Browses moss and pine tips beneath the snow.

species.name: Frost Ptarmigan
species.description: Ground bird camouflaged white against the snow.

species.name: Frostspire Lynx
species.description: Solitary hunter of the high snow forest.

species.name: Windward Ibex
species.description: Sure-footed grazer of the plateau heath.

species.name: Deepwood Deer
species.description: Browser ranging between forest and prairie edge.

species.name: Deepwood Thrush
species.description: Seed-spreading songbird of the wet forest.

species.name: Sunla Bee
species.description: Keystone pollinator of prairie and heath.

species.name: Prairie Hare
species.description: Fast grazer of the open grassland.

species.name: Sunla Hawk
species.description: Soaring raptor patrolling the island's dry heart.

species.name: Blossom Sunbird
species.description: Long-billed nectar bird pollinating the sunbells.

species.name: Mooncup Bat
species.description: Night flier that pollinates the mooncup vine.

species.name: Dune Hawkmoth
species.description: Dusk moth pollinating the desert's flowers.

species.name: Ochre Lizard
species.description: Insectivorous lizard basking on the mesa.

species.name: Dunemarch Viper
species.description: Ambush snake buried in warm sand.

species.name: Cinder Cricket
species.description: Detritus-and-lichen grazer of the ash plains.

species.name: Basalt Skink
species.description: Heat-loving skink hunting among the cinders.

species.name: Deepwood Earthworm
species.description: Litter decomposer building forest soil.

species.name: Rimshore Crab
species.description: Beachcomber recycling wrack along the shore.

species.name: Shallows Damsel
species.description: Schooling grazer of the kelp and seagrass.

species.name: Rim Turtle
species.description: Seagrass grazer that nests on the beach.

species.name: Rimshore Gull
species.description: Opportunist of shore and shallows.

species.name: Shelf Shark
species.description: Top predator patrolling the coastal shelf.

edges.description: Nectar bats pollinate the mooncup vine at night.
Lynx take ptarmigan when hares are scarce.
Thrushes disperse oak seed through the forest.
Thrushes nest in the oak canopy.
Turtles nest on the Rimshore beach.
Earthworms decompose forest litter into soil.
Hares and deer compete for prairie grass.
Kelp forest shelters damselfish that in turn fertilize it.
Thrushes migrate to the grove when it fruits.

cycle.name: Verdant Spring
cycle.description: Glacier melt swells the rivers; the grove and prairie bloom.

cycle.name: High Summer
cycle.description: Hot and dry; the prairie cures and the desert bakes.

cycle.name: Amber Autumn
cycle.description: Oak mast falls and thrushes move to the fruiting grove.

cycle.name: Deep Winter
cycle.description: Snow reloads the glacier; the high forest goes silent.

events.name: Glassrun Freshet
events.description: Melt-swollen rivers overspill the prairie each spring.

events.name: Sunla Burn
events.description: Dry-season fire that resets the grassland.

events.name: Dunemarch Drought
events.description: Prolonged rainless spells shrinking the oasis.

events.name: Cindermaw Eruption
events.description: Periodic ashfall burying and later enriching the basalt.

events.name: Grove Bloom
events.description: Synchronous spring flowering drawing every pollinator.

events.name: Rimshore Gale
events.description: Autumn gales battering the cliff coast.

events.name: Frostspire Slip
events.description: Thaw-loosened slopes shedding rock and ice.

events.name: Thrush Passage
events.description: Seasonal movement of thrushes to fruiting trees.

dynamics.name: Snowline Predator-Prey Cycle
dynamics.description: Coupled lynx and hare abundance oscillate on a roughly decadal cycle.

dynamics.name: Grassland Fire Regeneration
dynamics.description: Periodic burns clear thatch and rejuvenate the prairie sward.

dynamics.name: Hollowmere Glacial Cycle
dynamics.description: Long advance-and-retreat of the glacier setting baseline river flow.

dynamics.name: Thrush Migration Cycle
dynamics.description: Annual thrush movement tracking oak mast and grove fruiting.

dynamics.name: Deepwood Nutrient Cycle
dynamics.description: Litter decomposition returning nutrients to the forest soil.

dynamics.name: Emberreach Succession
dynamics.description: Lichen-then-fern colonization of fresh basalt after each eruption.
